body.value:
@concat('[',
  '{"table_name":"plm_revisions","last_watermark":"',   formatDateTime(utcNow(),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'), '","merge_key":["part_id","revision"],"adls_path":"bronze/plm/revisions"}',
  ',',
  '{"table_name":"plm_bom","last_watermark":"',         formatDateTime(utcNow(),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'), '","merge_key":["assembly_id","part_id"],"adls_path":"bronze/plm/bom"}',
  ',',
  '{"table_name":"erp_cost","last_watermark":"',        formatDateTime(utcNow(),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'), '","merge_key":["part_id","supplier_name"],"adls_path":"bronze/erp/cost"}',
']')

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT
    part_id,
    revision,
    status,
    effective_from,
    effective_to,
    last_modified,
    SYSUTCDATETIME() AS _ingestion_ts
FROM dbo.plm_revisions
WHERE last_modified >  '@{activity('Lookup-GetLatestWatermark').output.value[0].last_watermark}'
  AND last_modified <= SYSUTCDATETIME()

SELECT
    assembly_id,
    part_id,
    quantity,
    last_modified,
    SYSUTCDATETIME() AS _ingestion_ts
FROM dbo.plm_bom
WHERE last_modified >  '@{activity('Lookup-GetLatestWatermark').output.value[1].last_watermark}'
  AND last_modified <= SYSUTCDATETIME()

SELECT
    part_id,
    supplier_name,
    cost,
    currency,
    last_updated,
    SYSUTCDATETIME() AS _ingestion_ts
FROM dbo.erp_cost
WHERE last_updated >  '@{activity('Lookup-GetLatestWatermark').output.value[2].last_watermark}'
  AND last_updated <= SYSUTCDATETIME()

SELECT
    part_id,
    revision,
    status,
    effective_from,
    effective_to,
    last_modified,
    SYSUTCDATETIME() AS _ingestion_ts
FROM dbo.plm_revisions
WHERE last_modified > '@{activity('Lookup-GetLatestWatermark').output.value[0].last_watermark}'
  AND last_modified <= SYSUTCDATETIME()

SELECT
    assembly_id,
    part_id,
    quantity,
    last_modified,
    SYSUTCDATETIME() AS _ingestion_ts
FROM dbo.plm_bom
WHERE last_modified > '@{activity('Lookup-GetLatestWatermark').output.value[1].last_watermark}'
  AND last_modified <= SYSUTCDATETIME()

SELECT
    part_id,
    supplier_name,
    cost,
    currency,
    last_updated,
    SYSUTCDATETIME() AS _ingestion_ts
FROM dbo.erp_cost
WHERE last_updated > '@{activity('Lookup-GetLatestWatermark').output.value[2].last_watermark}'
  AND last_updated <= SYSUTCDATETIME()

properties.description: Incremental UPSERT of erp_cost staging Parquet into Delta table. Merge key: part_id + supplier_name.

sources.name: SourceStagingParquet
sources.description: Reads incremental Parquet written by copy_erp_cost

transformations.name: AlterRowUpsert
transformations.description: Mark every incoming row as an UPSERT candidate
